Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to wellness checks on older adults during certain weather events, and to repeal repetitions of the definition of “older adult” in subdivision a of section 21-205.1, subdivision a of section 21-210, subdivision a of section 21-211, subdivision a of section 21-215, and subdivision a of section 21-216 of such code
Items.ActionText: This Introduction was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Wellness checks on older adults during certain weather events, and to repeal repetitions of the definition of “older adult”.
